name: Roguelike/Roguelite
description: Procedurally generated runs with permadeath, meta-progression, and strategic depth

mechanics.coreLoop: Start fresh run → Explore procedural levels → Acquire random upgrades → Make risk/reward decisions → Die and lose progress → Unlock meta-upgrades → Start stronger run
playerActions: Navigate procedurally generated rooms and levels
Choose between random power-ups and synergistic builds
Engage in skill-based combat or challenges
Decide between safe path vs risky reward rooms
Discover item synergies and broken combinations
Unlock new characters with different playstyles
Learn enemy patterns for future runs

mechanics: Run-based progression: grow powerful within single run, reset on death
Meta-progression: unlock new items, characters, and abilities for future runs
Branching paths with different biomes and challenges
Currency spent between runs for permanent upgrades
Knowledge-based progression: learn patterns and strategies

winConditions: Defeat final boss and complete the run
Reach the end of all biomes/chapters
Unlock all endings or true final boss
failConditions: Health reaches zero (permadeath - start new run)
Some roguelites allow limited revives or continues
Must restart from beginning, keeping only meta-progression
Lose accumulated run-specific power and items

resourceSystems.name: Health
resourceSystems.mechanics: Limited healing, must be strategic about taking damage

resourceSystems.name: Currency (Gold/Coins)
resourceSystems.mechanics: Found in run, used for items in shops or between-run upgrades

resourceSystems.name: Meta-Currency (Gems/Souls)
resourceSystems.mechanics: Persists after death, used for permanent unlocks

resourceSystems.name: Item Slots/Build Capacity
resourceSystems.mechanics: Limited number of active items or upgrades

setting.era: Varies widely: fantasy dungeons, sci-fi spaceships, mythological underworlds
setting.location: Ever-changing procedural realms, dungeons, or dimensions
setting.worldType: Often metaphorical or abstract, with narrative emerging through gameplay

protagonist.background: Cursed soul trapped in cycle of death and rebirth, dungeon delver, or escaped prisoner
protagonist.motivation: Escape the cycle, reach the surface, defeat the source of the curse, seek vengeance or redemption
abilities: Ability to learn and improve despite amnesia
Mastery of various weapons and powers

conflict.primary: Trapped in an endless dungeon or realm, must fight through impossible odds to escape or break the cycle
secondary: Environmental hazards unique to each biome
Curse or fate that forces the cycle to continue
Other trapped souls (NPCs) with their own agendas
The protagonist's own limitations and mortality

worldRules.physics: Often fantastical with game-logic physics (bullet-hell, dash mechanics)
worldRules.magic: Magic or advanced tech grants random powers, creating unique build combinations
worldRules.technology: Ranges from medieval weapons to futuristic guns depending on setting

themes: The cycle of death and rebirth

targetAudience: Players who enjoy high replayability and overcoming challenges
